HomePage.title: Welcome to Silver Costa Residences
HomePage.subtitle: Discover your perfect home for the golden years.

Hero.headline: Premium Winter Rentals on the Costa del Sol
Hero.subtitle: Silver-Standard long stays for active retirees. Your home, healthcare, and community in Spain, managed with a single call.
Hero.supportText: Leave the cold and bureaucracy behind. We curate stays of 1 to 9 months between Fuengirola and Nerja, so you can simply enjoy your time.

StepsSection.stepsTitle: Three steps to your winter retreat
StepsSection.step1Desc: Complete our brief questionnaire to outline your lifestyle, health, and location preferences in just 2 minutes.
StepsSection.step2Desc: A Managing Partner will contact you directly to refine every detail and present a curated proposal.
StepsSection.step3Desc: From legal paperwork and healthcare to your property readiness. We handle the logistics so you can simply focus on the sun.
StepsSection.imageAlt: Premium terrace with Mediterranean views - Silver Costa Residences stay

BentoGrid.title: The Standard of Excellence in Long Stay Spain for Retirees
BentoGrid.pillar1Text: Warm homes in winter, no unexpected stairs, guaranteed fibre optic and 100% secure and legal seasonal contracts.
BentoGrid.pillar2Text: We navigate Spanish administration for you. We manage your Non-Lucrative Visa (NLV), Schengen rules (90/180) and your registration.
BentoGrid.pillar3Text: Enjoy with peace of mind. We connect you with the best private medical network (such as Vithas Xanit) with fast-track access and manage your insurance.
BentoGrid.pillar4Text: You will never feel alone. Exclusive access to our Private Social Club, weekly events, wine tastings and connection with local associations.

Questionnaire.pageSubtitle: Share your vision with us, and our local experts will take care of the rest.

contact.privacyNote: Your privacy is our priority. A Silver Costa Residences Managing Partner will review your vision and contact you within 24 hours.

Success.title: Thank you for your trust
Success.description: Your details have been successfully received and your profile is now active. The 2026 Costa del Sol Guide is on its way to your inbox. You can also download it below.
Success.nextStepDescription: To guarantee the excellence of our Silver-Standard service, our Managing Partner reserves 15 minutes to begin designing your stay and answer any questions you may have.
Success.trustBadge: 100% legally verified properties & expert logistical support.
